			<script type='text/javascript'>

				(function() {

					/*	check if webfonts are disabled by user setting via cookie - or user must opt in.	*/
					var html = document.getElementsByTagName('html')[0];
					var cookie_check = html.className.indexOf('av-cookies-needs-opt-in') >= 0 || html.className.indexOf('av-cookies-can-opt-out') >= 0;
					var allow_continue = true;
					var silent_accept_cookie = html.className.indexOf('av-cookies-user-silent-accept') >= 0;

					if( cookie_check && ! silent_accept_cookie )
					{
						if( ! document.cookie.match(/aviaCookieConsent/) || html.className.indexOf('av-cookies-session-refused') >= 0 )
						{
							allow_continue = false;
						}
						else
						{
							if( ! document.cookie.match(/aviaPrivacyRefuseCookiesHideBar/) )
							{
								allow_continue = false;
							}
							else if( ! document.cookie.match(/aviaPrivacyEssentialCookiesEnabled/) )
							{
								allow_continue = false;
							}
							else if( document.cookie.match(/aviaPrivacyGoogleWebfontsDisabled/) )
							{
								allow_continue = false;
							}
						}
					}

					if( allow_continue )
					{
						var f = document.createElement('link');

						f.type 	= 'text/css';
						f.rel 	= 'stylesheet';
						f.href 	= 'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Open+Sans:400,600&display=auto';
						f.id 	= 'avia-google-webfont';

						document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(f);
					}
				})();

			</script>

<div  class='hr av-i9e53-b70fa734af5eb0b71a1d03d38f5c2582 hr-custom  avia-builder-el-41  el_after_av_heading  el_before_av_one_third  hr-center hr-icon-no'><span class='hr-inner inner-border-av-border-fat'><span class="hr-inner-style"></span></span></div>
<div  class='flex_column av-hmnur-5398e9cca624e8343bb19636102cad85 av_one_third  avia-builder-el-42  el_after_av_hr  el_before_av_one_third  first flex_column_div av-animated-generic bottom-to-top av-zero-column-padding  '     ><article  class='iconbox iconbox_left_content av-h5w2n-2f3c8cb95db235cfdc1f71de1b7b4f07  avia-builder-el-43  avia-builder-el-no-sibling '  itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" ><div class="iconbox_icon heading-color" aria-hidden='true' data-av_icon='' data-av_iconfont='entypo-fontello'></div><div class="iconbox_content"><header class="entry-content-header" aria-label="Icon: 1950年代"><h3 class='iconbox_content_title '  itemprop="headline" >1950年代</h3></header><div class='iconbox_content_container '  itemprop="text" ><h4>船舶分野の業務拡大</h4>
<p>客船からコンテナー船と幅広い分野での船舶用機器の製作と販売を開始。</p>
</div></div><footer class="entry-footer"></footer></article></div><div  class='flex_column av-gjlan-955c8d58d17c47bfcf6293bc54bd84c6 av_one_third  avia-builder-el-44  el_after_av_one_third  el_before_av_one_third  flex_column_div av-animated-generic bottom-to-top av-zero-column-padding  '     ><article  class='iconbox iconbox_left_content av-1kdhn-d1ec22e520e3bea6445846e80ffca8a0  avia-builder-el-45  avia-builder-el-no-sibling '  itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" ><div class="iconbox_icon heading-color" aria-hidden='true' data-av_icon='' data-av_iconfont='entypo-fontello'></div><div class="iconbox_content"><header class="entry-content-header" aria-label="Icon: 1970年代"><h3 class='iconbox_content_title '  itemprop="headline" >1970年代</h3></header><div class='iconbox_content_container '  itemprop="text" ><h4>エネルギー分野に進出</h4>
<p>船舶分野だけでなく、火力発電プラント機器やメンテナンス装置の製作と販売を開始しました 。</p>
</div></div><footer class="entry-footer"></footer></article></div><div  class='flex_column av-f2swr-9e1763c4deeae068068ab4304007069b av_one_third  avia-builder-el-46  el_after_av_one_third  el_before_av_one_third  flex_column_div av-animated-generic bottom-to-top av-zero-column-padding  '     ><article  class='iconbox iconbox_left_content av-enl2j-8abf812e17ead7477969be8ed04b76f8  avia-builder-el-47  avia-builder-el-no-sibling '  itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" ><div class="iconbox_icon heading-color" aria-hidden='true' data-av_icon='' data-av_iconfont='entypo-fontello'></div><div class="iconbox_content"><header class="entry-content-header" aria-label="Icon: 1980年代"><h3 class='iconbox_content_title '  itemprop="headline" >1980年代</h3></header><div class='iconbox_content_container '  itemprop="text" ><h4>原子力発電分野に進出</h4>
<p>原子力発電プラント検査装置のメンテナンス機器・設備の開発や発電用機器の製作に取り組んでいます。</p>
</div></div><footer class="entry-footer"></footer></article></div><div  class='flex_column av-e809n-6851b58462877217e68aa4c18a23545f av_one_third  avia-builder-el-48  el_after_av_one_third  el_before_av_one_third  first flex_column_div av-animated-generic bottom-to-top av-zero-column-padding  column-top-margin'     ><article  class='iconbox iconbox_left_content av-dndlj-3367ba87b76e0628cd3ff1ba0d65128b  avia-builder-el-49  avia-builder-el-no-sibling '  itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" ><div class="iconbox_icon heading-color" aria-hidden='true' data-av_icon='' data-av_iconfont='entypo-fontello'></div><div class="iconbox_content"><header class="entry-content-header" aria-label="Icon: 1990年代"><h3 class='iconbox_content_title '  itemprop="headline" >1990年代</h3></header><div class='iconbox_content_container '  itemprop="text" ><h4>真空機器・宇宙分野への取り組み</h4>
<p>超伝導加速器や超伝導船推進機器の部品製作や販売に携わるとともに、ロケット射場設備やスペースシャトル搭載用機器の製作などの新機種開発に挑戦しました。</p>
</div></div><footer class="entry-footer"></footer></article></div><div  class='flex_column av-crhzn-69f240f27912bcc8ccfb01a962bba9fe av_one_third  avia-builder-el-50  el_after_av_one_third  el_before_av_one_third  flex_column_div av-animated-generic bottom-to-top av-zero-column-padding  column-top-margin'     ><article  class='iconbox iconbox_left_content av-cfb6f-983a2d6e607a664e19007e387fd44085  avia-builder-el-51  avia-builder-el-no-sibling '  itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" ><div class="iconbox_icon heading-color" aria-hidden='true' data-av_icon='' data-av_iconfont='entypo-fontello'></div><div class="iconbox_content"><header class="entry-content-header" aria-label="Icon: 2000年代"><h3 class='iconbox_content_title '  itemprop="headline" >2000年代</h3></header><div class='iconbox_content_container '  itemprop="text" ><h4>淡水化・水処理分野に進出</h4>
<p>火力・原子力発電所の冷却水滅菌システム設計で世界中の発電所建設に貢献しています。また、冷却水滅菌システム設計の経験を活かし、東南アジアでの上・下水事業への取り組みや、濾過膜を使用した淡水化事業にも取り組んでいます。</p>
</div></div><footer class="entry-footer"></footer></article></div><div  class='flex_column av-bogz3-1e163f92565c98d5395408e0c67caca0 av_one_third  avia-builder-el-52  el_after_av_one_third  avia-builder-el-last  flex_column_div av-animated-generic bottom-to-top av-zero-column-padding  column-top-margin'     ><article  class='iconbox iconbox_left_content av-b8s07-32fb3a9bffc390f064cedfa18843eb90  avia-builder-el-53  avia-builder-el-no-sibling '  itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" ><div class="iconbox_icon heading-color" aria-hidden='true' data-av_icon='' data-av_iconfont='entypo-fontello'></div><div class="iconbox_content"><header class="entry-content-header" aria-label="Icon: 2010年代"><h3 class='iconbox_content_title '  itemprop="headline" >2010年代</h3></header><div class='iconbox_content_container '  itemprop="text" ><h4>海外進出を本格化</h4>
<p>海外の事業比率が高くなったことから、タイをはじめとした海外への進出を本格化しました。発電プラントで培った経験や淡水化・水処理の技術を活かして進出国のインフラ整備に寄与してまいります。</p>
</div></div><footer class="entry-footer"></footer></article></div>
